news.t: Corporate Bonds Are a Great Deal if You Don't Look Too Closely
This bond strategy can protect your portfolio even if interest rates go up

overview.description: The Vanguard Long-Term Corporate Bond ETF (VCLT) is an exchange-traded fund that is based on the Bloomberg US Corporate (10+ Y) index. The fund tracks a market-weighted index of investment-grade fixed-rate corporate bonds with maturities greater than 10 years. VCLT was launched on Nov 19, 2009 and is issued by Vanguard.

data.title: Corporate Bonds Are a Great Deal if You Don't Look Too Closely
data.text: Highly rated debts offer high yields but are priced close to perfection.

data.title: This bond strategy can protect your portfolio even if interest rates go up
data.text: A little-known investing formula shows exactly how long to hold bonds to neutralize interest-rate hikes.

data.title: Best Bonds For Income
data.text: For many, social security isn't enough to fund their retirement needs. Bonds can help produce another income stream.
